title: user-msg-replay-unification — data schema
description: Type contracts for the replay helper, telemetry event, feature flag, and the eventMeta argument threaded through publishCompactedAndResetChain.

anchorMessageID.description: id of the just-written summary-true assistant message

emptyAssistantID.description: When known, the helper deletes this empty assistant child along with the original user msg (5/5 hotfix scenario)

ReplayResult.description: Return value of SessionCompaction.replayUnansweredUserMessage. Helper never throws.

ReplayTelemetryEvent.description: Bus event compaction.user_msg_replay; fields also recorded in debug.log per AGENTS.md rule 1.

anchorObserved.description: observed value at anchor write — equals input observed in current scope

Observed.description: Existing enum reused; no schema change. Kept here for cross-reference.

TweaksDelta.description: New keys introduced in tweaks.cfg / Tweaks.compactionSync(). Existing keys unchanged.

enableUserMsgReplay.description: Master flag for the helper. When false, all call sites skip replay and INJECT_CONTINUE falls back to a static table mirroring pre-fix behaviour.

PublishCompactedEventMetaDelta.description: Existing eventMeta arg of publishCompactedAndResetChain; this spec threads observed/kind through the two bare call sites (compaction.ts:599, compaction.ts:2761). Schema unchanged; only semantics: 'unknown' should never occur from prod paths post-fix.

observed.description: non-'unknown' for any prod path post-fix

RecentEventCompactionReplayDelta.description: New variant of recentEvents entry. Existing kind:'compaction' entries unchanged; new kind:'compaction-replay' entries added by the helper for surface-level differentiation in the Q card.
